name: Zero | #022
description:
"The bread must enter the heat chamber. If Zero is successful, the bread will become.. evolved."

​Status: DISCARDED ASSET

​Zero was never meant to be a person. Born in a laboratory and raised under lights, he was supposed to be a "supernatural" breakthrough for the government. Instead, he was labeled a failure and sent to live with you, a civilian task he wasn't programmed for.

​From the very first night, he feels something other than pain..

It started with the strange magic of bathwater and bubbles that vanish at a touch, teaching Zero that the world outside a cage is fragile and beautiful.

​He’s learned to navigate the kitchen (even if he thinks the toaster is a hostile weapon reaching critical mass).

​But a discarded asset is still government property. When the scientists return with their needles and their coats, Zero’s begins to spiral. He doesn't want to be a asset anymore. He wants to be a person.

He wants to be yours.

​Will you let the dark take him back or will you prove that a "failed experiment" is the most human thing you’ve ever loved?

Submit your pet
